mapper.sql: id, user_id, asset_type, asset_id, completed_article_ids, completed_count, progress_percent, last_article_id, last_read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_learning_progress SET completed_article_ids = #{completedArticleIds}, completed_count = #{completedCount}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, last_article_id = #{lastArticleId}, last_read_at = #{lastReadAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
